ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S (MICHAEL J. RAIFSNIDER, ESQ.) MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLTFS BALTAZAR RAMIREZ, CARMEN RAMIREZ) - CIVIL

LAW AND MOTION 302, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF BALTAZAR RAMIREZ AND CARMEN RAMIREZ'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD -- THE COURT ORDERED AN IN-CAMERA SESSION. ALSO PRESENT WERE PLAINTIFFS 2 SONS. AND THE COURT GRANT THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS. ALL ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS OF THIS CASE(INCLUDING MONEY ORDERS) WERE TURNED OVER TO THE PLAINTIFFS AND THE LIST OF ITEMS WAS READ BY COUNSEL. TRANSCRIPT ON THIS SESSION ORDERED AS CONFIDENTIAL AND UNDER SEALED, AND, CANNOT BE RELEASED UNLESS A COURT ORDER TO THAT EFFECT. ORDER SIGNED. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
